title: Termination, Budgets, Timeouts, and Progress Detection · Mastery Check
summary: Stop an agent safely under success, failure, budget, and no-progress conditions. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a loop termination and budget policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Terminate only when completion evidence satisfies the goal contract.
Classify retryable, recoverable, authority-blocked, and terminal failures.
Budget turns, tokens, time, tool calls, money, and external side effects.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Bounded agent-loop portfolio. No external effects occur in this browser lab."""

steps.title: Success Stop · changed case
steps.instruction:

content.text: Terminate only when completion evidence satisfies the goal contract. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Graceful Handoff applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Stop with a resumable state, evidence, and explicit unmet conditions.
